debug_info.goal:
𝕜 : Type u_2
α : Type u_4
mα : MeasurableSpace α
inst✝² : DiscreteMeasurableSpace α
inst✝¹ : Fintype α
inst✝ : RCLike 𝕜
f g : α → 𝕜
p q r : NNReal
hr₀ : some r ≠ 0
hpqr : ENNReal.HolderTriple (some p) (some q) (some r)
⊢ p ≠ 0

proof:
by
    obtain ⟨h⟩ := hpqr
    by_contra hp
    simp [hp] at h
    exact hr₀ (by simp [← ENNReal.inv_eq_top, h.symm])
failed_attempts:
by
    rintro rfl
    obtain ⟨h⟩ := hpqr
    simp at h
    exact hr₀ h

by
    intro rfl
    have := ENNReal.HolderTriple.inv_add_inv (p := some p) (q := some q) (r := some r)
    simp at this
    exact hr₀ this

by
    rintro rfl
    simpa [hr₀] using hpqr.inv_add_inv

by
    intro rfl
    apply hr₀
    rw [← ENNReal.inv_eq_top, ← hpqr.inv_add_inv]
    simp

by
    rintro rfl
    simpa [ENNReal.coe_zero, ENNReal.inv_zero, ENNReal.top_add, ENNReal.inv_eq_top, ENNReal.coe_eq_zero, hr₀] using hpqr.inv_add_inv
fun rfl ↦ by simpa using hpqr.1.symm

by
    rintro rfl
    have := hpqr.inv_add_inv
    simp [ENNReal.inv_eq_top] at this
    exact hr₀ this

by
    intro hp
    rw [hp, ENNReal.HolderTriple, ENNReal.coe_zero, ENNReal.inv_zero, top_add] at hpqr
    exact hr₀ (ENNReal.inv_eq_top.1 hpqr.symm)

by
    by_contra hp
    apply hr₀
    rw [← ENNReal.inv_eq_top, ← ENNReal.HolderTriple.inv_add_inv_eq_inv]
    simp [hp]

by
    intro hp
    simpa [hp, hr₀] using hpqr.inv_add_inv.symm

by
    rintro rfl
    simpa [ENNReal.inv_eq_top] using hpqr.inv_add_inv.symm
by rintro rfl; simpa [hr₀] using hpqr.inv_add_inv

by
    rintro rfl
    rcases hpqr with ⟨h⟩
    simpa [hr₀] using h

by
    rintro rfl
    apply hr₀
    simpa using hpqr.inv_add_inv

by
    rintro rfl
    simpa [hr₀] using ENNReal.HolderTriple.inv_add_inv (p := some 0) (q := some q) (r := some r)

by
    obtain ⟨h⟩ := hpqr
    rintro rfl
    simp only [ENNReal.coe_zero, ENNReal.inv_zero, ENNReal.top_add] at h
    exact hr₀ (ENNReal.inv_eq_top.1 h.symm)

by
    rintro rfl
    simpa [hr₀, ENNReal.inv_eq_top] using hpqr.inv_add_inv

by
    rintro rfl
    have := hpqr.inv_add_inv_eq_inv
    simp only [ENNReal.coe_zero, ENNReal.inv_zero, top_add, ENNReal.inv_eq_top,
      ENNReal.coe_eq_zero] at this
    exact hr₀ this

by
    intro rfl
    simpa [ENNReal.inv_ne_top hr₀] using hpqr.1

by
    rintro rfl
    cases hpqr
    simp_all

by
    rcases hpqr with ⟨h⟩
    intro hp
    simpa [hp, ENNReal.inv_eq_top] using h.symm

by
    rintro rfl
    simpa [hr₀, ENNReal.inv_eq_top] using hpqr.1

by
    rintro rfl
    cases hpqr
    simp [ENNReal.coe_zero, ENNReal.inv_zero, ENNReal.top_add, ENNReal.inv_eq_top] at *
    contradiction

by
    intro rfl
    simpa [hr₀] using ENNReal.HolderTriple.inv_add_inv (p := p) (q := q) (r := r)
by intro rfl; simpa [hr₀] using hpqr.inv_add_inv.symm

by
    rintro rfl
    simp [ENNReal.HolderTriple] at hpqr
    exact hr₀ hpqr

by
    intro h
    apply hr₀
    rw [← ENNReal.inv_eq_top, ← hpqr.inv_add_inv]
    simp [h]

by
    rintro rfl
    simp [ENNReal.coe_zero, ENNReal.inv_zero, top_add] at hpqr
    exact hr₀ (ENNReal.inv_eq_top.mp hpqr.symm)

by
    by_contra hp
    simpa [hp, hr₀] using hpqr.inv_add_inv

by
    rintro rfl
    simpa [hr₀] using hpqr.sum_inv

by
    intro rfl
    simpa [hr₀] using hpqr.inv_add_inv
successful_attempts:
by
    obtain ⟨h⟩ := hpqr
    by_contra hp
    simp [hp] at h
    exact hr₀ (by simp [← ENNReal.inv_eq_top, h.symm])
